chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.78 of 2024 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi 14.04.2025 Ms. Nasima Mangrio, advocate the appellant. Mr.Kazim Raza Abbasi, advocate for Respondents No.1 and 2. Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for respondent No.3. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- After hearing the parties, we dispose of this appeal with consent in terms, whereby although the impugned order is upheld, however, the stay order operating in the suit before passing of the impugned order, shall remain upto two months w.e.f. today. Accordingly, this High Court Appeal is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
